languages.text: "Что за теологические разногласия у вас с остальными?"
"What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"
languages.original_text: "Что за теологические разногласия у вас с остальными?"

traits.locale_text: "What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"
"What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"
"What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"

languages.text: «¿Qué disputas teológicas tiene con los otros tecnosacerdotes?».
languages.original_text: "What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué disputas teológicas tiene con los otros tecnosacerdotes?».

languages.text: “你跟其他技术神甫之间有什么神学上的分歧？”
languages.original_text: "What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"

traits.locale_text: “你跟其他技术神甫之间有什么神学上的分歧？”

languages.text: « À quels débats théologiques vous livrez-vous avec les autres technoprêtres ? »
languages.original_text: "What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"

traits.locale_text: « À quels débats théologiques vous livrez-vous avec les autres technoprêtres ? »

languages.text: "Welchen theologischen Disput habt Ihr mit den anderen Techpriestern?"
languages.original_text: "What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"

traits.locale_text: "Welchen theologischen Disput habt Ihr mit den anderen Techpriestern?"

languages.text: "他のテック・プリーストとどのような神学論争がありますか？"
languages.original_text: "What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"

languages.text: "Diğer Tekno Rahiplerle ne gibi teolojik tartışmalarınız var?"
languages.original_text: "What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"

traits.locale_text: "Diğer Tekno Rahiplerle ne gibi teolojik tartışmalarınız var?"
